name: Hebei Sinopack Electronic Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hebei Sinopack Electronic Technology Co.,Ltd. develops, produces, and sells multi-layer ceramic packaging products. The company offers electronic ceramic products for use in the areas of optical communication, industrial laser, infrared detector, microwave communication, automotive electronics, and consumer electronics. It also engages in the import and export business; and the provision of technical consulting services. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Shijiazhuang, China.
